scripts.prisma:generate: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma generate"
scripts.prisma:db:push: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma db push"
scripts.prisma:db:reset: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma db reset --force"
scripts.prisma:db:seed: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma db seed"
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma migrate dev"
scripts.prisma:migrate:create: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma migrate dev --create-only"
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: docker compose run --rm api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma migrate deploy"
scripts.prisma:studio: docker compose run --rm --service-ports api sh -lc "CI=1 pnpm install --force --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm prisma studio --hostname 0.0.0.0"
scripts.db:setup: pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm prisma:db:push && pnpm prisma:db:seed
